title: Anheuser-Busch Does Not Get It
description:
#budlight  #anheuserbusch  #CultureCasino

Anheuser-Busch does not get it. They have strayed very far into the globalist mindset and far away from freedom. They are enduring backlash from both sides now. Their non-apology was offensive to most of their target market and the subsequent commercial came off as terribly disingenuous and manipulative. All it would take is an apology. 

Here's what I think.
